entry.title: Reduce Rack Drum Kit Size
entry.summary: For the Yamaha DTX8 the cymbals mount on to the horizontal drum rack tubes. A more compact setup can be …
entry.content: For the Yamaha DTX8 the cymbals mount on to the horizontal drum rack tubes. A more compact setup can be achieved if the cymbal mounts are onto of the vertical tubes. Some drum racks already have this setup, typically on the lower end as it requires less harder to be supplied. It seems like a great way to save space if trying to fit a drum kit into your home!  Gibraltar have this clamp, to convert other drum racks with (1.5”) 38.1mm tubing.

entry.title: Expanding Yamaha DTX8 Drum Kit
entry.summary:
TOM

Parts Required for adding 4th Tom (second floor tom) to a Yamaha DTX8 kit.

Mounting bracket for rack: Yamaha …
entry.content:
TOM

Parts Required for adding 4th Tom (second floor tom) to a Yamaha DTX8 kit.

Mounting bracket for rack: Yamaha TPCL500 Tom Holder. UK supplier.

10” tom, on the DTX8 they are all 10”: Yamaha XP125T M.   Note are the Mesh heads(M), not the (X) heads.  UK supplier.

eBay might also be a good source for used components.

Adding a Cymbal

Cable splitting tom1 for tom1 single zone and a single zone splash cymbal.

  • Yamaha PCY10010-inch cymbal pad
  • Yamaha CYAT500 Cymbal Attachment  Splash £180 UK Supplier.

Alternatively for another crash or simply larger 13” pad a Yamaha PCY135A pad could be used.

Crash £200 UK Supplier.

entry.title: Yamaha Drum App
entry.summary: For Yamaha electronic drum kits (DTX) there is a ‘DTX Touch app’ for iPhone, iPad, Android that lets you more …
entry.content: For Yamaha electronic drum kits (DTX) there is a ‘DTX Touch app’ for iPhone, iPad, Android that lets you more easily manage the kit sounds.
